awesomeList.descriptionHTML: 😎 A curated list of the best resources in the Nix community [maintainer=@houstdav000]
awesomeList.description: 😎 A curated list of the best resources in the Nix community [maintainer=@houstdav000]

nodes.itemHTML: • NixDB - A database with Nix packages at all versions, from all channels.
• composer2nixstars60 - Generate Nix expressions to build composer packages.
• composition-c4stars3 - Support for building composer packages from a composer.lock (using IFD).
• nix-phpsstars5 - Flake containing old and unmaintained PHP versions (intended for CI use).
• #nixos on Libera.Chat
• #nix:nixos.org
• nix-haskell-modestars22 - Automatic Haskell setup in Emacs.
• stack2nixstars97 - Generate nix expressions for Haskell projects.
• nixkellstars32 - A Haskell project template using Nix and direnv.
• fenixstars43 - Rust toolchains and rust analyzer nightly for nix.
• nixpkgs-hammeringstars73 - Beat your package expressions into a shape.
• nixos-upstars47 - Super easy NixOS installer that can be used from the installation ISO.
• nixpkgs-fmtstars197 - Nix code formatter for nixpkgs.
• pushnixstars13 - Simple cli utility that pushes NixOS configuration and triggers a rebuild using ssh.
• nix-treestars116 - Interactively browse the dependency graph of Nix derivations.
• pre-commit-hooks.nixstars100 - Run linters/formatters at commit time and on your CI.
• Colmenastars63 - A simple, stateless NixOS deployment tool modeled after NixOps and morph.
• crystal2nixstars5 - Convert shard.lock into Nix expressions.
• elm2nixstars67 - Convert elm.json into Nix expressions.
• nixduinostars20 - Nix-based tool to help build Arduino sketches.
• rust-nix-templaterstars16 - Generates Nix build and development files for Rust projects.
• NixCon - The annual community conference for contributors and users of Nix and NixOS.
• KubeNixstars230 - A Kubernetes resource builder using Nix.
• Nixerystars1.1k - A Docker-compatible container registry which builds images ad-hoc via Nix.
• NixOpsstars867 - The official Nix deployment tool, compatible with AWS, Hetzner, and more.
• Arionstars208 - Run docker-compose with help from Nix/NixOS.
• nixpkgs-reviewstars112 - The best tool to verify that a pull-request in Nixpkgs is building properly.
• Napalmstars37 - Support for building npm packages in Nix with a lightweight npm registry.
• yarn2nixstars111 - Generate Nix expressions from a yarn.lock file.
• Easy PureScript Nixstars129 - A project to easily use PureScript and other tools with Nix.
• Bundixstars83 - Generates a Nix expression for your Bundler-managed application.
• musnixstars181 - Do real-time audio work in NixOS.
• Home Managerstars1.9k - Manage your user configuration just like NixOS.
• Nix Pills - The best way to learn, with examples.
• nix.dev - An opinionated guide for developers about getting things done using the Nix ecosystem.
• Tour of Nix - An online interactive tutorial on Nix language constructs.
• Hound - Handily search across all or selected Nix-related repositories.
• NixOS Weekly - The newsletter to stay informed about community updates.
• nixos-generatorsstars379 - Take a NixOS config and build multiple different images types including VirtualBox VMs, Azure images, and installation ISOs.
• Nix Infra Status - Get the age and current git commit of each Nix channel.
• krops - A lightweight toolkit to deploy NixOS systems, remotely or locally.
• terraform-nixosstars125 - A set of Terraform modules designed to deploy NixOS.
• nix-diffstars111 - A tool to explain why two Nix derivations differ.
• nix-prefetchstars36 - A universal tool for updating source checksums.
• cached-nix-shellstars109 - A nix-shell replacement that uses caching to open subsequent shells quickly.
• Cachix - Hosted binary cache service; free for open-source projects.
• gitignore.nixstars103 - The most feature-complete and easy-to-use .gitignore integration.
• lorristars947 - A much better nix-shell for development that augments direnv.
• nivstars707 - Easy dependency management for Nix projects with package pinning.
• node2nixstars273 - Generate Nix expressions from a package.lock npm file.
• nixcloud-webservicesstars101 - A Nixpkgs extension with a focus on ease of deployment of web-related technologies.
• Simple Nixos Mailserver - A complete mailserver, managed with NixOS modules.
• nix-bitcoinstars160 - Nix packages and NixOS modules for Bitcoin nodes with higher-layer protocols with an emphasis on security.
• nixpkgs-mozillastars300 - Mozilla's overlay with bleeding-edge Rust and Firefox.
• nixpkgs-waylandstars183 - Bleeding-edge Wayland packages.
• NURstars493 - Nix User Repositories. The mother of all overlays, allowing access to user repositories and installing packages via attributes.
• Discourse - The best place to get help and discuss Nix-related topics.
• KuberNixstars559 - Single-dependency Kubernetes clusters via Nix packages.
• poetry2nixstars147 - Build Python packages directly from Poetry's poetry.lock. No conversion step needed.
• naerskstars210 - Build Rust packages directly from Cargo.lock. No conversion step needed.
• nix-indexstars206 - Quickly locate Nix packages with specific files.
• Channel History - Get historical git commits for Nix channels.
• haskell.nixstars296 - Alternative Haskell Infrastructure for Nixpkgs.
• mach-nixstars253 - Tool to create highly reproducible python environments.
• pypi2nixstars182 - Generate Nix expressions for Python packages.
• awesome-nix-hpcstars23 - High Performance Computing package sets.
• nix-direnvstars249 - A fast loader and flake-compliant configuration for the direnv environment auto-loader.
• nixfmtstars212 - A formatter for Nix code, intended to easily apply a uniform style.
• cabal2nixstars232 - Converts a Cabal file into a Nix build expression.
• commastars206 - Quickly run any binary; wraps together nix run and nix-index.
• nixos-shellstars166 - Simple headless VM configuration using Nix (similar to Vagrant).
• Nix Notesstars27 - A collection of short notes about Nix, each contributing to the same virtual machine image.
• Nix Shortsstars237 - A collection of short notes about Nix.
• Wiki (Unofficial)
• terranix - Use Nix and the NixOS module system to write your Terraform code.
• morphstars345 - A tool for managing existing NixOS hosts.
• Discord - Nix/Nixos (Unofficial)
• nix-darwinstars739 - Manage macOS configuration just like on NixOS.
